infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Listahan uses speech recognition so you can add items and prices by voice.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Listahan uses the microphone to capture your voice for item and price entry.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Listahan uses Face ID to unlock your vault.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Listahan uses the camera to scan share QR codes and capture list text from photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Listahan uses your photo library to import a share QR from an image.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Listahan to use the microphone for voice entry.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow Listahan to use speech recognition for voice entry.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Listahan to use the camera to scan a share QR code or capture list text.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Listahan to access photos to import a share QR from an image.
